title: Adobe Express Hero Section
prompt: Generate a simple hero section with a ProductLockup for Adobe Express and a primary CTA button

title: Adobe Firefly Hero Section
prompt: A hero section for Adobe Firefly. Dark background. ProductLockup with the Firefly icon, a headline, one line of body copy, and a primary CTA button. Use S2A tokens for all colors.
